creator: AroraRavi@hotmail.com
text:
We have INN running on our BSD machine. We were able to create newsgroups. 
But if anybody wants to post a message to newsgroup. He gets an error message stating the following :-

	"Can't parse date header".

We have tried this using Pine, Netscape and Mosaic also.

We are in India and our timezone is set to IST, which is GMT+0530.

The date command at shell gives the following output :-
	Thu Oct 16 12:41:12 IST 1997

The time command :-

 0.180u 1.356s 44:30.04 0.0% 0+0k 5+115io 0pf+0w
